summary: Checkout latency spiked after the last deploy and the payment-service error rate is climbing.

cookbook.title: Rollback the risky deploy and verify checkout health

items.action: Roll back payment-service to the previous stable deployment.
items.done_when: The new pods are serving traffic and the error rate starts dropping.

items.action: Watch checkout latency and 5xx metrics for five minutes.
items.done_when: Latency returns near baseline and the 5xx rate stays low.
